To productionize: 1) get long-lived (non-expiring) Page token via Access Token Debugger extend -> /me/accounts; 2) wrangler secret bulk FB_PAGE_ID=1164805160053339 + FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN; 3) apply migration 202606101200_social_publications_fb.sql (platform fb); 4) wrangler deploy subscriptions worker; 5) verify scheduled() processFbAutopost posts on cron. Code committed: fb.ts (byte upload), fb-autopost.ts.

title: Cron content pipeline: pre-generate images into matrix + scheduled article generation and periodic publishing
description: Stage A: batch pre-generate images for idea rows (gen-images.mjs loop) so image_status=generated ahead of time. Stage B: scheduled drafting (gen-drafts) + auto-export + auto-publish N articles/day via GitHub Actions cron or local scheduled task. Respect daily caps, validate before publish.

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text: Stage B (scheduled publish) shipped via content-autopublish.yml. Stage A (image pre-gen) = local WSL+Grok loop: npm matrix:images. Drafting: npm matrix:drafts. Remaining: wire a local Windows scheduled task for image+draft pre-gen so the matrix always has approved rows ahead of the cron.

title: Publish-without-rebuild: new article appears on site automatically (incremental publish pipeline)
description: Current: static export requires full rebuild. Design: scheduled GitHub Actions workflow (cron) that exports approved matrix rows to MDX, commits, builds, deploys to dist branch + VPS webhook. Site updates without manual action. Alternative considered: runtime fetch from Supabase (rejected: SEO/static).

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text: Done (de4795f4): auto-publish.mjs + content-autopublish.yml cron. Needs GH secrets CONTENT_PUBLISH_PAT, MATRIX_SUPABASE_URL, MATRIX_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY. Site updates with no manual step once rows reach approved+image-generated.

title: VK autopost: publish WITH photo - obtain user token (photos+wall scope), set VK_PHOTO_ACCESS_TOKEN, attach photo+link together, verify live post
description: photos.getWallUploadServer requires USER token, not group token. Code already supports VK_PHOTO_ACCESS_TOKEN (workers/subscriptions/src/social/vk.ts). Steps: 1) get user token via OAuth implicit flow for standalone app with scopes photos,wall,groups,offline 2) wrangler secret bulk (BOM gotcha!) 3) change attachments to 'photoX_Y,<canonicalUrl>' so post has both image and clickable link 4) live test
notes: 2026-06-10: VK Mini App built (vk-miniapp/), deployed https://1001sovet.ru/vk-app/, app 54626241 Размещение Web+m.web set to that URL, moderation RESUBMITTED by operator. Once verified, VK ID OAuth2.1 user token (wall+photos) becomes obtainable to unblock photo posting.

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text: Runbook written: reports/vk-photo-token-howto-2026-06.md. Code already supports VK_PHOTO_ACCESS_TOKEN. Remaining: user obtains token (needs VK admin login in browser), set secret via bulk, live post with requirePhoto=true allowLinkFallback=false.

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text: Note: post BODY formatting now fixed (c58730e2) — headings/bullets/blank lines render cleanly. Photo attachment still needs VK_PHOTO_ACCESS_TOKEN (user token) per runbook.

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text:
VK status 2026-06-10 (community: Ежедневные Лайфхаки 1001sovet.ru, VK_GROUP_ID=239393062):
- Text post + formatting WORKS (wall-239393062_8): emoji headings, bullets render great.
- BUG FIXED (76d3146a): wall.post must be POST; long Cyrillic message as GET -> fetch failed.
- IMAGE blocker CONFIRMED empirically: community token -> photos.getWallUploadServer = vk_27 method unavailable with group auth. Photo upload needs USER token.
- VK removed Standalone app type (only Mini-app/Game/Plugin); old implicit oauth -> Security Error; VK Admin app -> application is blocked.
- Link-card with og:image did NOT render despite valid og:image (1408x768). VK link snippet via API unreliable.
DECISION NEEDED: full VK image requires VK ID OAuth 2.1 PKCE user token (needs VK_ID_CLIENT_SECRET). Otherwise VK posts are text-only (nicely formatted) + source link.

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text:
CONCLUSIVE (2026-06-10): VK image posting in ANY form requires a USER token.
- Community token + photo upload: vk_27 method unavailable with group auth.
- Community token + link card: vk_100 link_photo_sizing_rule. No photo given
  (VK demands an attached photo for community link posts; wont auto-use og:image).
- VK 2026 only issues user tokens for wall/photos via VK ID OAuth2.1, and those
  scopes require the app to be VERIFIED. Site VK app 54626241 is unverified
  (доступно только по ссылке). Verification = moderation process, not a quick step.
Current state: VK autopost works as TEXT + formatting + source link, with graceful
text-only fallback already in code. Full VK images are blocked pending app verification.

title: [epic] Rewrite auth (registration, login, password reset) to production-ready using existing Supabase Auth
description: Follow the detailed phased plan in reports/auth-audit-registration-login-2026-06.md and the user-provided Grok prompt. Vertical slices, beads-driven, no full auth migration, reuse Turnstile, fix profile creation, add proper reset/confirm UX, shared PasswordInput, intent preservation, tests, final verification report.
notes: Recon complete per prompt: git status shows ahead 3 with our auth commits, many untracked content images (ignored as instructed). Read plan, checklist, audit reports, AuthModal (has reset completion + forgot + verify with resend), AuthButton (PASSWORD_RECOVERY open), AdminLoginForm (has show/hide), moy-kabinet (uses .single() on profiles - risk), supabase client (plain, no special options). package.json has no browser E2E, tests are node. No dedicated auth callback routes - client-side Supabase hash handling. Current code has basic verify screen and resend, but no cooldown, no change email, no improved copy per P0.2. Proceeding to implement P0.2 vertical slice: enhance confirmation UX + resend cooldown. Will not close beads without verification.

title: [audit] Full product/UX/tech/security audit of registration & login on 1001sovet.ru
description: User reported no verification email on register. Current auth is incomplete: no password recovery, no password visibility toggle, unclear states, weak email diagnostics. Goal: produce severity report + ideal spec + impl plan + copy. Do not break prod, mark any test users for deletion. Work from code + live site + DNS checks.
design: Report structure: P0-P3 findings with file/line/evidence/repro/expected/actual/root/recommended/exact changes. Then A Ideal UX Spec (flows, modals, states), B Tech Impl Plan (config, DNS, components, tests), C Prod-ready checklist, D Exact RU copy strings. Use code paths: src/components/auth/AuthModal.tsx:1 etc. Live site + DNS verified via tools. No secrets published, no users created in this run.
notes: Audit complete and delivered. Files: reports/auth-audit-registration-login-2026-06.md (full consolidated report) + reports/auth-fix-prompt-for-codex.md (short standalone prompt for Codex). Previous related work referenced (auth-email-confirmation-root-cause.md etc.). Implementation can now start.

Signup for filipp+authqa_20260604075626@1001sovet.ru was accepted without rate-limit error, Mailcow received subject 'SovetyDoma: confirm your email' from SovetyDoma <maryana.sidorova@1001sovet.ru>, confirmation was consumed, and signInWithPassword returned a confirmed user session. title: Set CONTENT_PUBLISH_PAT so the auto-publish cron actually deploys
description: content-autopublish.yml pushes with GITHUB_TOKEN when CONTENT_PUBLISH_PAT is unset; GITHUB_TOKEN pushes do NOT trigger deploy.yml, so the autonomous cron commits articles but never deploys them. Create a fine-grained PAT (contents:write on this repo) and set it as repo secret CONTENT_PUBLISH_PAT. Then hands-off publishing works end-to-end.

title: [auth] VK ID widget fails on live ('Не удалось открыть VK ID') - fix SDK init / app redirect config
description: AuthModal loads @vkid/sdk, app=NEXT_PUBLIC_VK_APP_ID(54625895), redirect origin/api/auth/vk/callback, scope email. Live shows error. Likely SDK load blocked OR app VK ID redirect not whitelisting 1001sovet.ru/api/auth/vk/callback OR app unverified. Ties to VK app verification (sovetydoma-500).
notes: ROOT CAUSE FOUND + FIXED (2026-06-10): VK_ID_APP_ID/NEXT_PUBLIC_VK_APP_ID was 54625895 — a nonexistent app. Real app is 54626241 (verified live in dev.vk.com). Fixed: wrangler.toml var + worker redeploy + gh secret NEXT_PUBLIC_VK_APP_ID=54626241 + site rebuilt; live bundle now uses 54626241 (commit 768510c7). REMAINING manual check: ensure app 54626241 VK ID settings whitelist redirect https://1001sovet.ru/api/auth/vk/callback (couldn't verify — Chrome extension flaky). Also VK app still unverified, which may limit VK ID for non-test users until moderation passes.

title: [auth] OAuth buttons don't work: enable Google in Supabase; VK via VK ID widget (broken); Yandex needs custom flow or remove
description: Verified 2026-06-10 via authorize endpoint: yandex='could not be found', google='not enabled', vk='could not be found'. Supabase signInWithOAuth supports google (enable in dashboard with GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET) but NOT yandex/vk. VK should use the existing VK ID widget (currently errors 'Не удалось открыть VK ID' on live - investigate SDK init/app 54625895 redirect config). Yandex: implement custom OAuth (YANDEX_OAUTH_* secrets exist) like VK exchange, OR remove the misleading button. Modal itself works.
notes: Yandex: custom OAuth flow IMPLEMENTED + deployed (5af6955d). Worker route /auth/yandex/exchange live (provider_unconfigured until secrets set). Client redirects to oauth.yandex.ru w/ CSRF state; callback exchanges via worker -> Supabase magiclink. Remaining = operator: register redirect URI https://1001sovet.ru/auth/callback/ in Yandex app + set worker secrets YANDEX_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + gh secret NEXT_PUBLIC_YANDEX_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID + rebuild. Runbook: reports/yandex-oauth-setup-2026-06.md. Google=done earlier. VK widget=bead 1fc.

notes: P1 profile: migration created + client fallbacks in AuthButton (maybeSingle+upsert) + moy-kabinet repair. Gates clean. Commit 636fa5ac. Closed after implementation.

title: P1: Extract reusable PasswordInput component with show/hide
description: Create a clean, accessible PasswordInput that can be used in AuthModal and AdminLoginForm. Support visibility toggle, proper autocomplete, aria, error states.
notes: P1.1: Created src/components/auth/PasswordInput.tsx (show/hide toggle, aria-label, disabled, minLength, error support). Integrated into reset form (directly helps P0), login and register forms in AuthModal for consistency. Minimal, no big rewrite. tsc/eslint clean. Commit done.

title: Version-control + CI-audit RLS policies for core UGC tables (comments, user_articles, photos, feedback_events, ratings, reactions, saved_articles, profiles) or migrate to RPC proxies
description: Security sub P1: only notification_* / analytics / view / subs migrations have explicit create policy / enable RLS / auth.uid() or security definer; core UGC presumed (not in git). Client always anon. Add to supabase/migrations/ + test in CI.
close_reason: Live RLS policies for 9 core UGC tables codified into supabase/migrations/202606102000_version_control_ugc_rls.sql (idempotent, no-op against live). Hardening: added WITH CHECK to comments UPDATE. Committed 9b37db05.

title: Add server-side proxies + durable rate + ownership recheck for high-risk UGC writes (comments, user_articles, feedback_events incl anon, ratings, reactions, photos post-upload, questions) + client debounce on forms
description: Security sub P0 + xoq bead + main (Comments.tsx:229 insert, similar in UserArticleForm/napisat/Feedback/StarRating); current relies on presumed RLS + worker rates only for contact/view/subs. Re-use photo worker patterns or new /ugc/* endpoints. High spam/abuse risk.
close_reason: Durable non-bypassable rate limiting via BEFORE INSERT triggers (202606102100) on comments/questions/user_articles/feedback_events, reusing ingestion_rate_limits advisory-lock counter. No-ops when auth.uid() null so service-role /view ingestion unaffected. Ownership already enforced by RLS WITH CHECK; submitting-flag debounce + friendly rate_limited messages on forms. Chose DB triggers over worker proxy: a proxy is bypassable while RLS permits authenticated direct writes. Verified live (5th comment/min rejected). 9b37db05.

title: Add auth/login favorite sync migrate: localStorage favorites -> server saved_articles upsert + clear local (CardFavoriteButton/izbrannoe/moy-kabinet)
description: Quality sub: desync (local always read, server only sets true on login, no write-back of anon saves); anon cross-device loss + race on tabs/login. See CardFavoriteButton.tsx:13/73/80 + izbrannoe/page.tsx:14/56/66.
notes: Implemented: new src/lib/favorites.ts with getLocalFavorites + migrateLocalFavoritesToServer (upsert loop + clear). Called from: AuthModal handleLogin success (using returned user), AuthButton initial getUser + onAuthStateChange (when u present). Logout now calls clearLocalFavorites() too (privacy). Centralized read calls in FavoriteButton, CardFavoriteButton, izbrannoe/page to the shared helper (less key duplication). Also improved login error mapping for 'Invalid login credentials' → Russian (verified QA item). tsc clean, eslint clean. This closes the main P1 desync from browser audit. 0h3.7 intent partially satisfied by this.
close_reason: Implemented migration on auth + logout clear + shared reads. Code committed and pushed (fce02e94). tsc+eslint clean. Matches the P1 from browser QA verification exactly. 0h3.7 intent advanced.

title: Replace inner npm run with pnpm in package.json + docs/ops/plans/HANDOFF; rm tracked package-lock.json + ignore; document pnpm-only
description: Quality sub + main grep: package.json test:10/15 + many docs use 'npm run' while pnpm is canonical (pnpm-lock, CI pnpm install --frozen, handoff); package-lock.json 279KB tracked (ls-files confirms). Skew/flake risk.
close_reason: Verified clean: no tracked package-lock.json; package.json scripts use 'pnpm run'; workflows use pnpm. Already pnpm-only.

description: Content sub: fm.image often /images/borshch.jpg (slug idealnyy-borshch.jpg exists) or 'placeholder' or name mismatch (chistka-dukhovki etc); audits pass on fs slug only; causes emoji fallbacks + SEO/perf issues despite 329/329 claim.
notes: FIXED: 58 drifts repaired with scripts/fix-image-frontmatter-drifts.mjs (271 already good). Updated: validate-articles now requires image-slug match (build gate), audit-article-images reports+can --fail-on-drifts (pkg updated), image-audit-utils exports drifts, test extended, Kimi prompts updated, HANDOFF refreshed, previews generator run to 329/329. All gates (validate, pnpm audit:images) clean. 329 articles now have correct fm pointing to their jpgs (mix real openverse/unsplash + generated). Previews complete. Ready for future batches: use fix + audit + generate:previews after import/fetch.
close_reason: 58 image fm drifts repaired + prevention: bulk validate now enforces requireImageSlug (with import), audit now surfaces drifts and fails on --fail-on-drifts, fixer script added+run, Kimi docs updated, previews filled to 329, gates verified clean. All articles now reference their /images/<slug>.jpg correctly.

Verified pnpm test with NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1024, lint, build, GitHub CI/deploy success, VPS active build 58a5056, live feed-rybalka.xml 200 and sitemap rybalka hub present.

title: Tighten article validation (min 300 words hard error + mojibake/encoding detection)
description: From subagent deep-dive A3 + original forensic. Updated scripts/validate-article.mjs to error on <300 words (was warn) and detect common mojibake (FFFD or ÐÑÂÃ). Import already had <200 error. Test on future Kimi output. Run full validate on recent batch + fix any thin/mojibake.
notes: 2026-06-04 subagent deep scan (content+main): exactly 29 shorts <300w confirmed by batch node scan on all 329; 2 real mojibake (kak-ne-peregretsya... + poryadok-v-igrushkah inspected, full garbage in title/desc/tags); import still 200w/no-mojibake vs validate 300+mojibake (post prior forensic); 58 image drifts; see reports/forensic-subagent-deep-scan-2026-06-04.md + new bead sovetydoma-jbk
close_reason: Fixed shared article validator and synced import/single-file validation to 300w hard minimum, mojibake detection, H2 warnings, and import image-slug enforcement. Repaired 29 short articles and 2 corrupted descriptions. Added validate-articles build gate, audit-seo integration, and tests. Verified node validate-articles, article-validation test, audit-seo, pnpm test, lint, tsc, and build. Existing 58 image drifts remain tracked in sovetydoma-mou.

title: Add server-side rate limiting + proxy for high-risk UGC writes (comments, feedback_events, user_articles, ratings)
description: From RLS subagent deep-dive A1 + original review P1 #4. Direct browser inserts rely on presumed cloud RLS; no client rates beyond localStorage. Add thin worker/edge proxy endpoints (reuse photo-upload worker patterns or new) for ownership re-check + rate (use existing notification_check_rate_limit or new). Or enforce + document strict RLS policies. High spam/bypass risk if RLS weak.
notes: 2026-06-04 security sub + main: direct supabase.from('comments').insert in Comments.tsx:229 (also user_articles/feedback/ratings/reactions/saved in other forms); no client rate beyond submitting flag; in-mem only in photo worker; RLS presumed unversioned for these tables (only recent subs migrations explicit). See new bead for proxies.
close_reason: Дубликат gx3 — серверный рейт-лимит UGC сделан DB-триггерами (202606102100_ugc_rate_limit_triggers.sql) на comments/questions/user_articles/feedback_events + RLS ownership + friendly messages. Live verified.

title: Omnichannel category subscriptions for selected categories
description: Users subscribe to selected categories and choose delivery channels from day one: email, Telegram, MAX, WhatsApp, SMS/phone, plus VK/Odnoklassniki/Facebook social follow targets.
acceptance_criteria: Users can select categories, choose channels, confirm/manage/unsubscribe per channel, and social follow targets are visible and tracked.
notes:
Implementation plan saved at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-02-omnichannel-category-subscriptions.md. Initial execution completed Task 1 validation/constants, Task 2 Supabase migration, and Task 3 publication index scripts/tests; verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build.
Continued implementation: added subscriptions Worker scaffold with durable /subscriptions/start writes, persistent Supabase rate limits, confirmation handling, diagnostics and social tracking; added static /podpiski page, category/article CTAs, footer replacement, social click tracking component, provider setup checklist. Verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, HTTP static checks on /podpiski, /kulinaria, article route.
2026-06-02 implementation update: completed first working pass for omnichannel category subscriptions. Added category-bound UI and /podpiski flow, manage_token mode, unsubscribe_token flow, Supabase schema for recipients/contacts/topics/preferences/confirmations/consents/publication index/deliveries/suppression/social targets/rate limits, subscription Worker with /subscriptions/start, /confirm, /manage, /unsubscribe, Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/Resend webhooks, admin diagnostics/dry-run/test-send behind ADMIN_API_KEY, scheduled digest processor, provider adapters for email/Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/SMS, social follow targets/tracking, article publication index sync scripts, ops checklist. Verified npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, and in-app browser QA for /podpiski, /kulinaria, article CTA, manage mode.
2026-06-02 review fixes: addressed Claude/Codex critical review set. Added fail-closed CORS/Turnstile behavior, ADMIN_API_KEY constant-time check, HMAC unsubscribe tokens with UNSUBSCRIBE_TOKEN_SECRET, keyed PII hashes, webhook secret/signature gates for Telegram/MAX/WhatsApp/Resend, non-mutating GET confirmation landing with POST confirm, duplicate contact recipient reuse, soft user unsubscribe, direct Worker List-Unsubscribe URL, retry-safe delivery semantics using sent-only dedup and failed-period retries, per-contact scheduled isolation, hourly timezone/delivery_window selection, MAX Authorization /messages shape, WhatsApp newline-free template params, social placeholder URL removal, manage-token hydration, shared validator usage, child-table RLS policies, atomic DB rate-limit RPC, handler-level tests via npx tsx. Verification: npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, wrangler dry-run, browser smoke for /podpiski and manage mode.
2026-06-02 Supabase apply: normal supabase db push was blocked because remote migration history contains older versions missing from local migrations. Applied subscription migrations directly to linked project sovetydoma/plwkjdpuxjkmpkqiqzkk via supabase db query --linked --file for 202606021300_omnichannel_subscriptions.sql and 202606021400_subscriptions_delivery_fairness.sql, then repaired those versions as applied. Verified remote notification tables, recipient manage/last_delivery columns, notification_check_rate_limit RPC, and social_follow_targets seeds. Remaining migration-history mismatch is older remote-only versions plus unrelated local pending analytics/view migrations.

title: FB per-category pages: ready-to-paste blocks + wire FB_PAGES_BY_CATEGORY
description:
Создание per-category FB страниц (autopost routing уже в коде: resolveFbPageForCategory + FB_PAGES_BY_CATEGORY). Форма Create a Page работает; "1001совет — Дача и огород" (категория Gardener) УЖЕ существует под аккаунтом (FB заблокировал дубль). Создать остальные вручную по блокам ниже, потом получить page-токены (/me/accounts) и прописать FB_PAGES_BY_CATEGORY (cat slug -> {pageId, token}).

ШАБЛОН имени: "1001совет — <Категория>" (тире — длинное «—»).

1) Дача и огород — кат. Gardener — УЖЕ СОЗДАНА
   Био: Полезные советы для дачи и огорода: сад, грядки, урожай, сезонные работы. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

2) Дом и уборка — кат. Home improvement / Cleaning service
   Био: Чистота и порядок без лишних усилий: уборка, хранение, лайфхаки для дома. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

3) Кулинария — кат. Cooking / Recipe
   Био: Простые рецепты и кухонные хитрости: вкусно, быстро, по-домашнему. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

4) Рыбалка — кат. Fishing / Outdoor recreation
   Био: Снасти, наживки, места и секреты клёва — всё для удачной рыбалки. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

5) Лайфхаки — кат. How-to / Media-news company
   Био: Полезные идеи и хитрости на каждый день — экономят время, силы и деньги. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

6) Экономия — кат. Personal finance / Media-news company
   Био: Как тратить меньше и жить лучше: бюджет, покупки, экономия дома. Больше — на 1001sovet.ru

Category slugs для FB_PAGES_BY_CATEGORY: dacha-i-ogorod(181), dom-i-uborka(73), kulinaria(55), layfkhaki(49), rybalka(36), ekonomiya(36). Опц. далее: zdorovie-i-bezopasnost, semya-i-deti, krasota-i-uhod, otdyh-i-puteshestviya, pokupki-i-tehnika, avto.

title: Move pre-generated matrix images out of git into R2 (repo/dist bloat: 1768 imgs, 1338 orphan)
description: auto-publish.mjs requires the image file present in the CI checkout, so matrix images are committed to git ahead of article publish. Result: public/images has 1768 jpgs but only 430 are linked (1338 orphans shipped to prod). Consider: store pre-gen images in R2 (photo-upload bucket), have auto-publish pull the image into public/images at publish time (or serve from R2). Keeps repo + dist lean.

title: Build + host VK Mini App at vk.1001sovet.ru to pass VK moderation
description: Scaffold DONE (commit 3361929f): vk-miniapp/ Vite+VKUI+vk-bridge, content from MDX (429 articles), screens (onboarding/categories/list/reader), builds clean. REMAINING: (1) visual QA (preview renderer was flaky this session — run 'pnpm --dir vk-miniapp dev' and check), (2) host static dist at vk.1001sovet.ru via Caddy on 89.169.44.37, (3) set app 54626241 Размещение Web+m.web URL to https://vk.1001sovet.ru, (4) re-run moderation (current request submitted 2026-06-10 04:02, in queue; real mini-app reduces rejection risk). Unblocks VK photo posting (bead -500).

title: Regenerate sub-1200px article images to >=1200px for Google Discover eligibility
description: 91% of article images are <1200px wide (76% are 1024x768), so they fail Google Discover / large-image-preview requirements. Generator default now fixed to 1280x960 (commit 11bd5125) so NEW images qualify. Need a backfill pass: re-run scripts/matrix/gen-images-fal.mjs (or a regen variant) at 1280x960 for the ~1600 existing sub-1200 slugs, re-deploy. Cost: ~1600 fal Flux Schnell gens. JSON-LD now reports true dims so it's honest in the meantime.
notes: 2026-06-10 night (autonomous): DONE for published articles. Reworked image prompting in lib.buildImagePrompt (strip people/hands→object focus, anti-figurine/goblin style, per-category scene anchor) + new regen-images-fal.mjs. Regenerated ~296 published-article images at 1280x960 (Discover-eligible): 239 object/food/garden via sanitizer; 57 vague/person prompts first LLM-rewritten to concrete topical object scenes (subagent), matrix image_prompt updated, then regenerated. Previews regenerated. Verified visually (child-safety now shows childproofing items, not goblins). Committed 4a1988ad + deploying. NOTE: this also committed ~1338 pre-generated matrix images (needed so CI auto-publish has the image file) — these are orphans-in-dist until their articles publish; consider moving pre-gen images to R2 to avoid repo/dist bloat.

Mirror for VK communities. Add config map + per-category dedup in fb-autopost/vk-autopost. Start with top verticals (dacha 179, dom 67, kulinaria 55, rybalka 35); keep small categories on main page.

Docs docs/AUTOPOST-MULTIPAGE.md. REMAINING (operator): create FB Pages per category, get page tokens via /me/accounts, set FB_PAGES_BY_CATEGORY secret. Then it just works.

title: 30 improvement ideas list (synthesis from audits)
description: Compile after security+efficiency audits: concrete 30-item improvement backlog with priorities

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text: 30-idea plan written: reports/improvement-plan-2026-06-10.md

title: Best user dashboard: personalized interesting reads, saved/history, category follows
description: Dashboard improvements: recommended articles by interests, reading history, saved articles UX, subscription management, gamification hooks

title: Efficiency audit 2026-06-10 (build time, scripts, matrix pipeline, bundle size incl 2.7MB vk index)
description: Find slow/wasteful spots: vk-publication-index.json 2.7MB in worker bundle, full rebuilds, duplicate scripts, image sizes, CI minutes

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text:
Efficiency audit findings 2026-06-10:
1. HIGH: build re-parses all 429 MDX ~5x (validate, article-index, sitemap, rss, next). Shared cached loader -> save ~5-8s/build.
2. HIGH: vk-publication-index.json ~2.8MB bundled into subscriptions worker -> move to KV/R2 or Supabase query (-750-900KB gzip).
3. MED: CI lacks .next cache; tests run serial -> ~2-4 CI min savings.
4. MED: public/images = 99MB, 860 JPG, no WebP/AVIF; .sources.json 7.6MB tracked in git.
5. LOW: tracked artifacts (.matrix-ideas 9MB, .beads 6MB, .sources.json) -> gitignore (~15-20MB).
6. LOW-MED: next staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=2 -> raise to 8 in CI (-20-40s).
7. LOW-MED: parallelize test scripts.
8. deps clean, no bloat.
Total potential: local build -20-30%, CI -4-8min, repo -15-20MB.

title: Create minimal /terms and /privacy pages (required by registration checkbox)
description: P1.2 reg form added required links to /terms and /privacy + checkbox. Pages do not exist (404 risk). Create simple placeholder pages with basic text + disclaimer that legal copy needs owner review. Keep minimal, no fake legal advice.
notes: Created minimal placeholder pages at /terms and /privacy as required by the registration form checkbox (added in P1.2). Kept text short with clear disclaimer that real legal copy must be provided by owner. Links now resolve instead of 404.
close_reason: Terms and privacy placeholders created so registration flow is complete.

title: Centralize + expand Supabase auth error mapping to Russian (login, resend, reset, forgot)
description: Audit + verification: many paths still leak raw English Supabase strings (beyond the one we fixed for invalid creds). Create reusable mapAuthError helper in AuthModal and apply everywhere. Cover common cases: invalid creds, rate, weak pass, etc. No enumeration.
notes: Added mapAuthError helper covering invalid creds, not confirmed, rate, password, already registered, invalid email. Replaced raw .message in login, register, resend, reset. Safe defaults that avoid enumeration. Applied to all auth paths in the modal.
close_reason: Centralized Russian auth error mapping done. Clean. Part of verified QA fixes.

title: Harden moy-kabinet loading: add error state + .catch/.finally so no infinite 'Загрузка' on getUser failure
description: Browser QA flagged intermittent hang on 'Загрузка' in cabinet via client nav. Current getUser().then has no catch, setLoading(false) only on success path. Even with profile repair, outer promise rejection leaves spinner forever. Add error state, finally, user-friendly message + retry or home link. Autonomous code fix.
notes: Restructured loading useEffect to async IIFE + try/catch/finally pattern with cancelled flag (matches other components). Added loadingError state + dedicated error UI with reload button. Directly addresses the 'hang on Загрузка' repro from browser QA even after profile repair. No more setLoading only on happy path.
close_reason: Implemented robust loading with error state. tsc+eslint clean. Commit pending.

title: P2: Turnstile + cooldowns on registration and reset flows
description: Integrate existing TurnstileWidget into register and forgot-password request when configured. Add client-side cooldown UI for resend/reset buttons.

title: Tests, browser QA and final results report
description: Add practical tests for new auth components/flows. Perform desktop+mobile browser QA. Write reports/auth-implementation-results-2026-06.md with changed files, test commands/results, remaining blockers, deployment notes.

title: P2: Preserve auth intent for favorites / comments / actions after login
description: When user triggers favorite or comment while logged out, after successful auth the action should be easy to complete or the user returned to the same article with state preserved. Improve current modal + post-login behavior.
notes: Implemented per full prompt: inspected all flows (FavoriteButton, CardFavoriteButton, AuthModal, AuthButton, izbrannoe, lib/favorites, article page). Documented exact old failure mode (unconditional clear on error in migrate, no intent marker, always reload eating context, caller id, register path lands in cabinet). Added pendingAuthIntent (sessionStorage), hardened migrate (no-arg, real session uid only, partial-fail keep local + return status), processPendingFavoriteIntent, live onAuth listeners in buttons, no-reload close on login success in modal for context preservation, RU messages, idempotent upserts. Updated callers. Login path smoke verified. Register-confirm explicitly left as blocked (real email required). Updated plan+results reports. Gates: tsc clean, eslint on touched, validate passed, browser smoke (logged-out heart->modal->login->preserved, no loss, live update, context kept). Commit: fix(auth): preserve favorite intent after login. Bead closed after verification steps. Next: 0h3.8 full QA matrix + real email when checklist run.

title: Remove 7 stray root package source dirs (argparse/ gray-matter@4.0.3 exact dupe of node_modules, js-yaml/, kind-of/, section-matter@1.0.0, is-extendable/, strip-bom-string/)
description: Quality + main: untracked per git ls-files + check-ignore but present (version match run confirmed gray-matter 4.0.3==4.0.3); historical extract cruft from content tools; pollutes tree/searches/disk; safe to rm (deps in pnpm store).

title: Add explicit email validation + inline error for malformed email in AuthModal

Added isValidEmail + emailError state. onBlur + onChange clearing + submit guards in login/register/forgot. Inline

under email fields. Clears on tab/mode switches. Directly addresses the 'malformed-email relies on native only' QA item.
